source_extracts.note: Verbatim copies of the course's course_data/ extracts, vendored here so the assignment is self-contained and needs no network.

authored_teaching_fixtures.note: These are invented for the exercise, NOT part of the real UCI extract. They exist so specific SQL patterns have something real to find.

no_order_customers.why: Two customers with zero transactions, so LEFT JOIN + IS NULL returns real rows (the 'customers who never bought' question).

duplicate_transaction.why: One exact-duplicate transaction line, so ROW_NUMBER()/DISTINCT de-duplication has something to bite on (drill D2 rediscovers it).

customers.detail: 10 real + 2 authored no-order fixtures; customer_id is PRIMARY KEY

transactions.detail: 60 real + 1 authored duplicate; transaction_id deliberately NOT unique

transactions_big.detail: 60 real lines x 1000 unique-id copies; used ONLY by the Part 3 benchmark
